_comment: SA-B4 Crimson Reach Black Market lot catalog. 14 lots across the 4 design-doc-locked Reach categories (contraband, restricted_weapon, salvage_lot, faction_commodity). Wreckers' Guild tier coverage (apprentice/journeyman/master). 1 headliner. Zero season tags (locked decision §B4.11). Headlines and descriptions in Reach register: terse, declarative, specific to the lot. Voice-checked against character_voices.md and dialogue_writing_guide.md.

lots.headline: Unstamped Fuel Additives, Twelve Drums
lots.description: Twelve drums of high-grade burn additive. No customs stamps. Compatible with most frontier reactors. Buyer handles transit.

lots.headline: Unmarked Medical Supplies, Sealed Crate
lots.description: Field medic kits and trauma packs. No batch numbers. Sealed by the original courier. Pulled from a wreck before the patrol arrived.

lots.headline: Silenced Runner Drones, Pair
lots.description: Two short-range courier drones with their transponders pulled. Quiet engines. Will not respond to a Guild ping.

lots.headline: Executive Data Cores, Three Units
lots.description: Sealed executive data cores from a defunct corporate run. Encrypted. The keys are not for sale here.

lots.headline: Pulse Carbines, Lot of Six
lots.description: Six factory-issue pulse carbines. Serial numbers ground off. Cleaned and tested by the seller. Ammunition not included.

lots.headline: Breach Charge Set, Sealed
lots.description: A boarding crew's breach kit. Shaped charges, primer cord, the works. Sealed since the previous owner stopped breathing.

lots.headline: Marksman Rifles, Pair
lots.description: Two long-barrel marksman rifles. Optics intact. Locked under Frontier Alliance prohibition for three years now.

lots.headline: Corporate Shuttle Hulk
lots.description: A gutted corporate shuttle. Engines pulled. The frame and fittings are still good. The Guild tagged the wreck and the salvage rights came with the lot.

lots.headline: Mining Rig Parts, Mixed
lots.description: A mixed lot of cutter heads, hopper plates, and torch rigs from a stripped mining rig. Surface rust. Working condition.

lots.headline: Jump Capacitors, Crate of Eight
lots.description: Eight jump capacitors, salvaged from a derelict freighter. Tested at the Junction. Two read low. The other six are clean.

lots.headline: Capital Armor Plating, Sectioned
lots.description: Four sections of capital-grade armor plating, cut clean and bench-flat. Provenance is a Guild battlewreck. The receipts are with Torres.

lots.headline: Axiom Sample Gel, Sealed Vials
lots.description: Twelve sealed sample vials of Axiom-grade research gel. The originating lab is no longer in operation. The seals are intact.

lots.headline: Miners' Union Rare Earth, Pallet
lots.description: A pallet of rare earth concentrate. The Union stamp is on every brick. The chain of custody breaks at the loading dock.

lots.headline: Frontier Grain, Six Pallets
lots.description: Six pallets of subsidized Frontier Alliance grain. The pallets are still sealed. The manifest says Verdant. The pallets say otherwise.
